properties.name: spring.llm.api-key
properties.description: API key sent in the {@code Authorization: Bearer} header. When left empty the client sends an empty bearer token; set via the {@code OPENAI_API_KEY} environment variable in production.

properties.name: spring.llm.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Must not include a trailing slash. Defaults to the official OpenAI API endpoint.

properties.name: spring.llm.connect-timeout-seconds
properties.description: HTTP connection timeout in seconds. Defaults to {@code 10}.

properties.name: spring.llm.default-model
properties.description: The model identifier used when the {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.llm.client.LlmClient#ask} convenience method is called, or when a request explicitly specifies {@code "default"}. Defaults to {@code "gpt-4o-mini"}.

properties.name: spring.llm.enabled
properties.description: Whether the LLM client is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.llm.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient {@code RestClientException} failures. A value of {@code 0} disables retries. Defaults to {@code 3}.

properties.name: spring.llm.read-timeout-seconds
properties.description: HTTP read timeout in seconds — how long to wait for the LLM to start streaming a response. Defaults to {@code 60} to accommodate slow model inference.
